tips_en: Start with DomainShuttle for its striking 18.7% improvement and well-defined problem framing around cross-domain video personalization. It pairs naturally with ShutterMuse—both tackle visual content generation/guidance—while the agent memory paper offers a complementary systems-level perspective on LLM infrastructure, useful for situating any agentic extensions of these visual systems.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读DomainShuttle，因为其实证结果突出（提升18.7%）且对跨域视频个性化的问题定义清晰。它与ShutterMuse天然呼应——两者都聚焦于生成模型驱动的视觉内容创作与指导；智能体记忆论文则提供了关于LLM基础设施的系统级视角，可为前两篇的任何智能体化扩展提供参考。
